/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_encoders.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_encoders.dir/test/test_encoders.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_encoders.dir/src/encoders/base64.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_encoders.dir/src/encoders/base85.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_encoders.dir/src/encoders/base32.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_encoders.dir/src/encoders/base36.cpp.o -o test_encoders
